title: 4 Pcs Air Fryer Baskets Silicone 20 cm, Air Fryer Liners Reusable Round, Air Fryer Silicone Pot Universal, Silicone Liners for Air Fryer Baskets Multifunctional
features: Quality Material: Our 4 airfryer silicone liners are made of food-grade high-quality silicone, which is safe, environmentally friendly and odourless, and can be used to bake a variety of healthy dishes
Reusable: Using silicone air fryer liners round is very eco-friendly, both reusable and easy to clean, keeping your air fryer clean and perfect all the time
Universal: The bottom diameter of the air fryer liners silicone is 17cm, no matter your air fryer is round or square you can use it
Washable: Silicone liners for air fryer baskets can be hand washed or dishwasher cleaned for daily cleaning, heavy stains can be put into boiling hot water with cooking soda for deep cleaning

Temperature Resistance: Our reusable silicone air fryer liners are suitable for -20℃~220℃, high temperature and baking resistance, can be used in air fryers, ovens, microwave ovens and various other baking appliances
description: FL HUA has been committed to creating higher quality products to bring you a superior user experience. Our air fryer silicone liners reusable round with better quality to meet your needs, long service life and easy to use. Features Airfryer baskets silicone are the perfect alternative to flammable parchment paper and can be reused many times without being easily deformed or damaged. The bottom of the liners for air fryer baskets round has a distinctive raised texture, which will make your food more evenly heated and also less likely to stick to the bottom. Our air fryer trays silicone has two gripping lugs on the edges to make it easier for you to remove it from the pan, and the air fryer silicone mould also doubles up as a plate, which is very nice and practical. Specifications Brand: FL HUA Material: Silicone Color: Red, Pink, Grey, Black Size: As Shown Package includes 4 x Air Fryer Basket Liners Silicone Tips Please check the product size before purchase.
